title: Aehr Test Systems Lands $12.7M in Silicon Carbide Orders
text: Aehr Test Systems secured $12.7 million in silicon carbide orders from an electric vehicle sector customer for WaferPak Contactors, with deliveries expected within three months. The company's president and CEO stated that these contactors are integral to the wafer level burn-in and screening of silicon carbide power semiconductors. The orders reflect growing demand in the EV market, as automakers increasingly adopt silicon carbide components in their vehicles. The contactors are customizable solutions tailored to individual customer specifications and part of Aehr's FOX series test systems, which support wafer sizes from 4 to 12 inches. This announcement aligns with Aehr's recent strong financial performance, which included a GAAP net income of roughly $33.1 million on revenues of around $66.2 million in fiscal 2024, exceeding both company guidance and analyst expectations.
